name: vcard-has-address-range-declared
query: PREFIX vcard: <http://www.w3.org/2006/vcard/ns#> ASK WHERE { vcard:hasAddress <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#range> vcard:Address }

name: vcard-adr-equivalent-property-declared
query: PREFIX vcard: <http://www.w3.org/2006/vcard/ns#> ASK WHERE { vcard:adr <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#equivalentProperty> vcard:hasAddress }
